title: FEMS outcome feedback loop: pack-outcome attribution + scoring tune (folded WP-1-FEMS-Outcome-Feedback-Loop)
goal: After a MemoryCapsule is used in a model call, track the downstream outcome (MT PASS/FAIL, validator verdict, escalation) and feed it back into per-item memory scoring. Good outcomes boost items in that capsule; bad outcomes penalize them. Folded from WP-1-FEMS-Outcome-Feedback-Loop. Ports the Cognee self-improving memory pattern. No LLM required (per FEMS V1 pattern).
expected_diff_shape: New module src/backend/handshake_core/src/memory/outcome_feedback.rs (OutcomeFeedbackLoop + CapsuleOutcome + OutcomeScoringTuner + OutcomeAttribution types). Tests src/backend/handshake_core/tests/outcome_feedback_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-145 (CapsuleRecorder so outcomes can attach to records) + MT-157 (bitemporal indexing so outcome attribution is replay-aware).
implementation_notes: Per WP-1-FEMS-Outcome-Feedback-Loop preserved_intent. Per refinement D.3: 'outcome feedback loop'. CapsuleOutcome enum: `Pass { mt_id, validator_verdict_id }`, `Fail { mt_id, validator_verdict_id, failure_class: FailureClass }`, `Escalation { mt_id, escalation_reason: String }`, `Skipped { reason: String }`. Surface: `pub struct OutcomeFeedbackLoop<'a> { recorder: &'a CapsuleRecorder, tuner: &'a OutcomeScoringTuner, action_catalog: &'a dyn KernelActionSubmitter }` with `pub fn record_outcome(capsule_id: Uuid, outcome: CapsuleOutcome) -> Result<OutcomeReceipt, OutcomeError>`. record_outcome attaches the outcome to the CapsuleRecord (via KernelActionCatalogV1 CapsuleOutcomeAttach action) then invokes the tuner. OutcomeScoringTuner: pure function `pub fn apply_outcome(item_scores: &mut HashMap<Uuid, f64>, outcome: &CapsuleOutcome, pack_items: &[MemoryPackItem], tuning_params: &TuningParams)`. TuningParams: `{ pass_boost: f64 (default 0.05), fail_penalty: f64 (default 0.10), escalation_penalty: f64 (default 0.15), per_item_decay_per_use: f64 (default 0.01) }`. Tuning is bounded (per-item score change capped per call to prevent runaway). NO LLM required - this is pure arithmetic per existing FEMS V1 pattern. Tests: PASS outcome increases item scores by exactly pass_boost; FAIL outcome decreases by exactly fail_penalty; Skipped outcome leaves scores unchanged; tuning is bounded per call; outcome attaches to record via mock catalog.
risk_if_missed: Without outcome feedback the scoring formula is frozen at static weights and a memory that consistently leads to failures keeps getting injected.
validator_focus: Pure arithmetic tuner (no LLM). Score changes are bounded per call. Outcome attaches via canonical action catalog.

minimum_controls: Tuner is pure arithmetic; no LLM call (preserves FEMS V1 no-LLM invariant).
Score changes are bounded per call so a single bad outcome cannot collapse a memory's score.
Outcome attachment flows through KernelActionCatalogV1 so audit trail is complete.
